query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A symmetrical photograph of electrical transmission towers and converging power lines stretching across a flat, wintry landscape. The dark silhouettes of the pylons stand near the center of the frame, with multiple cables radiating upward toward the top corners against a pale, overcast sky. The terrain below appears lightly covered in snow, and a faint horizon line separates the land from the sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A symmetrical photograph of electrical transmission towers and converging power lines stretching across a flat, wintry landscape beneath an overcast sky. The dark silhouettes of the pylons stand near the center, with multiple cables radiating upward. The image is rendered in muted, faded tones with flat lighting and oppressively low contrast that flattens depth and dimension, suffusing the barren scene with an atmosphere of melancholy and unease.
